name: beat-twin
description: Local Bitwig Studio bridge for MCP-based music workflow experiments.

scripts.build:packages: corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/commands build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/audio-tone build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/daw-contract build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/agent-contract build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/litert-provider build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/nanodaw-adapter build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/bitwig-adapter build && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/gateway-core build
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/playground build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @beat-twin/playground exec tsc -b
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run build:packages && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.ts packages/commands/test/*.test.ts packages/audio-tone/test/*.test.ts packages/daw-contract/test/*.test.ts packages/agent-contract/test/*.test.ts packages/litert-provider/test/*.test.ts packages/gateway-core/test/*.test.ts packages/adapters/nanodaw/test/*.test.ts packages/adapters/bitwig/test/*.test.ts apps/gateway/test/*.test.js tests/session-inspect.test.js tests/policy-gate.test.js tests/arrangement-plan.test.js tests/protocol-smoke.test.js tests/bitwig-controller-security.test.js tests/read-only-smoke.test.js tests/mcp-metadata.test.js tests/tool-registry.test.js
scripts.test:unit: corepack pnpm run build:packages && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.ts packages/commands/test/*.test.ts packages/audio-tone/test/*.test.ts packages/daw-contract/test/*.test.ts packages/agent-contract/test/*.test.ts packages/litert-provider/test/*.test.ts packages/gateway-core/test/*.test.ts packages/adapters/nanodaw/test/*.test.ts packages/adapters/bitwig/test/*.test.ts apps/gateway/test/*.test.js tests/session-inspect.test.js tests/policy-gate.test.js tests/arrangement-plan.test.js tests/bitwig-controller-security.test.js tests/read-only-smoke.test.js tests/mcp-metadata.test.js tests/tool-registry.test.js
scripts.test:packages: corepack pnpm run build:packages && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.ts packages/commands/test/*.test.ts packages/audio-tone/test/*.test.ts packages/daw-contract/test/*.test.ts packages/agent-contract/test/*.test.ts packages/litert-provider/test/*.test.ts packages/gateway-core/test/*.test.ts packages/adapters/nanodaw/test/*.test.ts packages/adapters/bitwig/test/*.test.ts
scripts.smoke:packages: corepack pnpm run build:packages && node scripts/package-smoke.js
scripts.capture:s25-tool-call: corepack pnpm run build:packages && node scripts/capture-litert-tool-call.js
